title: Jofi's Swords
description: Various improvements to swords including more cohesive colour pallets and improved and varied shapes
body:
This resorce pack makes improvements to swords including more cohesive colour pallets, improved/varied shapes and improved shading

![The Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/919a5a60301e564273f997e4e340b35ebc4ac0ba.png)

<details>
<summary>Usage</summary>
If you’d like to use this project in a modpack, adventure map, or server, please make sure to credit it by linking to the original source on Modrinth. <3

</details>

does not requier any mods to work!
